title: BansystemV1
description: that is a simple bansystem plugin easy to use and to install
body:
BansystemV1 is a professional ban and management system for Minecraft servers (compatible with 1.21–1.21.6). This plugin is designed for server administrators who want full control over player bans, unbans, and kicks, with a focus on reliability, usability, and flexibility. 

✨ **Key features include:**
- 🚫 **Ban, Unban, Kick:** Easily manage player bans with custom reasons and durations, unban players, and kick disruptive users with clear feedback.
- ⏳ **Automatic Unban:** Players are automatically unbanned when their ban duration expires, keeping your ban list clean and up-to-date.
- 🌍 **Multilingual Support:** All messages are configurable via messages.yml, allowing for easy translation and customization for any language.
- 💬 **Help Texts:** Every command provides helpful usage information, making it easy for staff to use the plugin correctly.
- 🔄 **Reload Command:** Instantly reload your messages.yml file in-game with `/bansystem reload`, so you can update texts without restarting the server.
- 🛡️ **Input Validation:** The plugin checks if players exist and validates time formats, preventing mistakes and improving reliability.
- 🧩 **Modular Code Structure:** The code is organized for maintainability and future expansion, with clear separation of logic and configuration.
- 📋 **Logging:** All important actions and errors are logged for admins, making it easy to track what happens on your server.
- 🏷️ **LuckPerms Integration:** Works seamlessly with LuckPerms for permission management.

Whether you run a small community or a large network, BansystemV1 gives you the tools to keep your server safe and well-managed. Designed for Spigot and Paper, it is lightweight, fast, and easy to configure. 

👤 **Author:** Lukas__YT
